name: Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Lie flat on bench, grip bar slightly wider than shoulder-width, lower to chest, press up explosively.

name: Incline Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Set bench to 30–45°, grip bar, lower to upper chest, press up.

name: Decline Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Set bench to -15°, lower bar to lower chest, press up.

name: Dumbbell Bench Press
instructions: Hold dumbbells at chest level, press up, squeeze at top.

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
instructions: Set bench to 30°, press dumbbells from chest level up and slightly together.

name: Dumbbell Flye
instructions: Lie flat, arms slightly bent, lower dumbbells in arc to sides, squeeze chest to bring back.

name: Cable Crossover
instructions: Stand between cables set high, pull handles down and together, squeeze chest.

name: Low Cable Fly
instructions: Set cables low, pull handles upward and together in arc.

name: Push-Up
instructions: Hands shoulder-width on floor, lower body until chest nearly touches, push back up.

name: Wide Push-Up
instructions: Hands wider than shoulder-width, perform push-up targeting outer chest.

name: Chest Dip
instructions: Lean forward on parallel bars, lower until shoulders below elbows, push up.

name: Machine Chest Press
instructions: Sit at machine, grip handles at chest level, press forward, return slowly.

name: Pec Deck
instructions: Sit at pec deck, place forearms on pads, bring together squeezing chest.

name: Barbell Row
instructions: Hinge at hips, back flat, pull bar to lower ribcage, lead with elbows.

name: Deadlift
instructions: Bar over mid-foot, hip-width stance, push floor away, lockout hips and knees simultaneously.

name: Sumo Deadlift
instructions: Wide stance, toes flared, grip inside legs, drive hips through to lockout.

name: Dumbbell Row
instructions: One knee and hand on bench, row dumbbell to hip, elbow grazes side.

name: Dumbbell Pullover
instructions: Lie perpendicular on bench, hold one dumbbell overhead, lower behind head in arc.

name: Pull-Up
instructions: Hang from bar, pull chest to bar leading with elbows, lower fully.

name: Chin-Up
instructions: Underhand grip, pull chin above bar, lower with control.

name: Inverted Row
instructions: Lie under bar, grip overhand, pull chest to bar keeping body straight.

name: Lat Pulldown
instructions: Grip bar wide, pull to upper chest, squeeze lats, return slowly.

name: Seated Cable Row
instructions: Sit upright, pull handle to abdomen, squeeze shoulder blades, return slowly.

name: Face Pull
instructions: Set cable high, pull rope to face, elbows high and wide, external rotate.

name: Machine Row
instructions: Chest on pad, pull handles to sides, squeeze shoulder blades together.

name: Machine Pulldown
instructions: Sit at pulldown machine, pull bar to chest, hold contraction.

name: Barbell Overhead Press
instructions: Bar at collarbone level, press overhead to full lockout, control descent.

name: Behind-the-Neck Press
instructions: Grip bar wide, lower behind head to upper traps, press overhead.

name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Sit or stand, dumbbells at ear level, press overhead, don't lock out fully.

name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
instructions: Arms slightly bent, raise dumbbells to shoulder height laterally, lower slowly.

name: Dumbbell Front Raise
instructions: Alternate raising each dumbbell to shoulder height in front, thumbs up.

name: Arnold Press
instructions: Start with palms facing you at chin height, rotate outward as you press up.

name: Cable Lateral Raise
instructions: Stand beside cable, raise handle to shoulder height, lower with control.

name: Cable Front Raise
instructions: Stand facing away from cable, raise handle forward to shoulder height.

name: Machine Shoulder Press
instructions: Sit at shoulder press machine, press handles overhead, return slowly.

name: Pike Push-Up
instructions: Form inverted V, lower head toward floor, push back up targeting shoulders.

name: Handstand Push-Up
instructions: Kick into handstand against wall, lower head to floor, push back up.

name: Barbell Curl
instructions: Underhand grip, curl bar to shoulder height, squeeze biceps, lower slowly.

name: EZ-Bar Curl
instructions: Use angled EZ-bar, curl from arms extended to shoulder height.

name: Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Alternate or simultaneous curl, supinate wrist at top, lower fully.

name: Hammer Curl
instructions: Neutral grip (thumbs up), curl dumbbells to shoulder, targets brachialis.

name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Lie on incline bench, arms hang, curl dumbbells with full stretch at bottom.

name: Concentration Curl
instructions: Sit, elbow against inner thigh, curl dumbbell with strict form.

name: Cable Curl
instructions: Stand facing cable low, curl bar to chin, maintain constant tension.

name: Cable Hammer Curl
instructions: Attach rope to low cable, curl with neutral grip.

name: Resistance Band Curl
instructions: Stand on band, curl handles to shoulders.

name: Machine Preacher Curl
instructions: Sit at preacher curl machine, curl handles from full extension to chin height.

name: Close-Grip Bench Press
instructions: Grip bar shoulder-width, lower to chest, press up feeling triceps stretch.

name: Skull Crusher
instructions: Lie flat, lower EZ-bar to forehead by bending elbows, extend back up.

name: Dumbbell Overhead Tricep Extension
instructions: Hold one dumbbell overhead with both hands, lower behind head, extend up.

name: Dumbbell Kickback
instructions: Hinge forward, upper arm parallel to floor, extend dumbbell back, squeeze at lockout.

name: Tricep Dip
instructions: Hands on chair or parallel bars, lower until elbows 90°, push back up.

name: Diamond Push-Up
instructions: Form diamond with hands under chest, perform push-up.

name: Cable Tricep Pushdown
instructions: Grip bar or rope at chest level, push down to hips, squeeze at bottom.

name: Cable Overhead Tricep Extension
instructions: Face away from cable, grip rope, extend overhead, lean forward slightly.

name: Machine Tricep Press
instructions: Sit at tricep press machine, push handles down to full extension.

name: Resistance Band Pushdown
instructions: Anchor band above, push handles down, squeeze triceps at bottom.

name: Barbell Back Squat
instructions: Bar on upper traps, squat below parallel, drive knees out, stand up.

name: Front Squat
instructions: Bar on front delts, upright torso, squat below parallel.

name: Hack Squat
instructions: Back on pad, feet shoulder-width, squat down and drive through heels.

name: Leg Press
instructions: Feet shoulder-width on platform, lower sled until 90°, push through heels.

name: Dumbbell Goblet Squat
instructions: Hold dumbbell at chest, squat with upright torso, elbows brush inner knees.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
instructions: Rear foot elevated on bench, lower front knee to floor, drive through front heel.

name: Leg Extension
instructions: Sit at leg extension machine, extend legs to full lockout, lower slowly.

name: Bodyweight Squat
instructions: Feet shoulder-width, arms forward, squat to parallel, keep chest up.

name: Jump Squat
instructions: Squat then explode upward, land softly, immediately squat again.

name: Sissy Squat
instructions: Hold support, lean back and lower knees toward floor, heels rise.

name: Barbell Lunge
instructions: Bar on traps, step forward, lower rear knee close to floor, drive back up.

name: Kettlebell Goblet Squat
instructions: Hold kettlebell at chest, squat deep, elbows press knees out.

name: Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Bar at hip level, hinge back, lower bar along legs feeling hamstring stretch, drive hips forward.

name: Dumbbell Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Hold dumbbells at thighs, hinge at hips, lower along legs, squeeze glutes to stand.

name: Leg Curl
instructions: Lie face down on machine, curl heels toward glutes, lower slowly.

name: Seated Leg Curl
instructions: Sit at leg curl machine, pull pad down, hold briefly, return slowly.

name: Nordic Hamstring Curl
instructions: Kneel, feet anchored, lower torso toward floor with eccentric hamstring control.

name: Good Morning
instructions: Bar on traps, hinge forward with slight knee bend until torso parallel, drive hips through.

name: Glute-Ham Raise
instructions: Anchor feet on GHD, lower forward, curl back up using hamstrings.

name: Cable Kickback
instructions: Attach ankle cuff, kick leg back, squeeze hamstring and glute at top.

name: Resistance Band Deadlift
instructions: Stand on band, hinge and extend as in conventional deadlift.

name: Swiss Ball Leg Curl
instructions: Lie on back, feet on ball, bridge up, curl ball toward glutes.

name: Barbell Hip Thrust
instructions: Upper back on bench, bar over hips, drive hips up to lockout, squeeze glutes.

name: Dumbbell Hip Thrust
instructions: Upper back on bench, dumbbell on hips, thrust up squeezing glutes.

name: Glute Bridge
instructions: Lie on back, feet flat, thrust hips to ceiling, squeeze glutes at top.

name: Cable Pull-Through
instructions: Face away from cable, rope between legs, hinge and extend, drive hips forward.

name: Sumo Squat
instructions: Wide stance, toes out, hold dumbbell between legs, squat and squeeze glutes at top.

name: Donkey Kick
instructions: On hands and knees, kick one leg back and up, squeeze glute at top.

name: Fire Hydrant
instructions: On hands and knees, lift knee out to side like dog at fire hydrant.

name: Romanian Split Deadlift
instructions: Single leg RDL, hinge with one leg floating behind, hold dumbbell in opposite hand.

name: Machine Glute Kickback
instructions: Stand at glute kickback machine, drive foot pad back to full extension.

name: Kettlebell Swing
instructions: Hinge at hips, swing kettlebell back between legs, snap hips forward, bell rises to shoulder height.

name: Resistance Band Hip Thrust
instructions: Band across hips, upper back on bench, drive hips up against band resistance.

name: Standing Calf Raise
instructions: Stand on calf raise machine, rise on toes to full extension, lower slowly.

name: Seated Calf Raise
instructions: Sit at seated calf raise, knees under pad, raise heels high, hold, lower.

name: Barbell Calf Raise
instructions: Bar on traps, stand on edge of step, lower heels below platform, rise to full extension.

name: Dumbbell Calf Raise
instructions: Hold dumbbells at sides, stand on edge of step, single or double leg calf raises.

name: Bodyweight Calf Raise
instructions: Stand on step edge, rise on toes, hold, lower slowly.

name: Single-Leg Calf Raise
instructions: Balance on one foot, rise on toes, lower with control.

name: Leg Press Calf Raise
instructions: On leg press, push platform with toes only, extend and flex calves.

name: Jump Rope
instructions: Skip rope with light bouncing motion, land on balls of feet.

name: Box Jump
instructions: Stand in front of box, jump and land softly on top with knees slightly bent.

name: Resistance Band Calf Raise
instructions: Stand on band, hold handles at shoulders, perform calf raises.

name: Plank
instructions: Forearms or hands on floor, body in straight line, hold position bracing core.

name: Side Plank
instructions: Lie on side, prop on forearm, lift hips, maintain straight line, hold.

name: Crunch
instructions: Lie on back, hands behind head, curl shoulders toward knees, lower slowly.

name: Bicycle Crunch
instructions: Alternately bring opposite elbow to knee, rotating through the core.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
instructions: Hang from bar, raise legs to 90° or higher, lower with control.

name: Ab Wheel Rollout
instructions: Kneel with ab wheel, roll out as far as possible without collapsing, roll back.

name: Cable Crunch
instructions: Kneel below cable, hold rope at forehead, crunch down, elbows to knees.

name: Russian Twist
instructions: Sit with feet elevated, rotate torso side to side, optionally hold weight.

name: Woodchop
instructions: Set cable high, pull across body in diagonal chop motion, rotate through core.

name: Dead Bug
instructions: Lie on back, arms and legs up, lower opposite arm and leg, return, alternate.

name: Barbell Rollout
instructions: Kneel with barbell loaded, roll out extending arms, return under core control.

name: Dumbbell Farmer Carry
instructions: Hold heavy dumbbells at sides, walk with upright posture and braced core.

name: Hollow Body Hold
instructions: Lie on back, lower back pressed to floor, arms and legs extended slightly off floor.

name: V-Up
instructions: Lie flat, simultaneously raise legs and torso to touch toes, lower slowly.

name: Dragon Flag
instructions: Grip bench behind head, raise entire body off bench, lower with control.

name: Cable Pallof Press
instructions: Stand sideways to cable, press handle straight out, resist rotation, return.

name: Dumbbell Side Bend
instructions: Stand with dumbbell in one hand, bend laterally, return upright.

name: Incline Dumbbell Fly
instructions: Set bench to 30°, arms slightly bent, lower dumbbells in arc, squeeze chest at top.

name: Kettlebell Press
instructions: Lie on floor or bench, press kettlebell from chest to lockout.

name: Resistance Band Chest Press
instructions: Anchor band behind you, press forward at chest height extending both arms.

name: T-Bar Row
instructions: Straddle bar, hinge over, grip handles, row to chest leading with elbows.

name: Pendlay Row
instructions: Bar returns to floor each rep, explosive concentric from dead stop, horizontal torso.

name: Kettlebell Row
instructions: One hand on bench, row kettlebell to hip, lead with elbow.

name: Resistance Band Pull-Apart
instructions: Hold band in front at shoulder height, pull apart squeezing shoulder blades.

name: Cable Straight Arm Pulldown
instructions: Face high cable, arms straight, pull bar down to hips engaging lats.

name: Dumbbell Shrug
instructions: Hold dumbbells at sides, shrug shoulders straight up, hold, lower.

name: Barbell Shrug
instructions: Hold bar at hip level, shrug shoulders toward ears, hold briefly, lower.

name: Upright Row
instructions: Grip bar narrow, pull to chin leading with elbows high and wide.

name: Dumbbell Rear Delt Fly
instructions: Hinge 90°, raise dumbbells laterally squeezing rear delts.

name: Cable Rear Delt Fly
instructions: Cross cables at low setting, pull handles diagonally upward, squeeze rear delts.

name: Resistance Band Shoulder Press
instructions: Stand on band, press handles overhead from shoulder level.

name: Kettlebell Single-Arm Press
instructions: Clean kettlebell to rack position, press overhead with single arm, lower with control.

name: Zottman Curl
instructions: Curl with supinated grip, rotate to pronated at top, lower with palms down.

name: Spider Curl
instructions: Lie prone on incline bench, arms hanging, curl dumbbells strict against arm pad.

name: Reverse Curl
instructions: Overhand grip, curl bar to chin, targets brachioradialis and bicep.

name: Kettlebell Curl
instructions: Hold kettlebell by handle, curl from arms extended to shoulder height.

name: Resistance Band Tricep Extension
instructions: Anchor band overhead, extend arms downward against resistance.

name: Barbell JM Press
instructions: Lower bar to throat while elbows travel toward chest, press back up using triceps.

name: Kettlebell Tricep Extension
instructions: Hold kettlebell overhead with both hands, lower behind head, extend up.

name: Hack Machine Squat
instructions: Step on hack squat platform, back flat on pad, lower and drive up.

name: Walking Lunge
instructions: Step forward into lunge, drive front heel to rise and step into next lunge.

name: Dumbbell Step-Up
instructions: Hold dumbbells at sides, step onto box with one foot, drive up, alternate legs.

name: Stiff-Leg Deadlift
instructions: Minimal knee bend, hinge with flat back, feel hamstring stretch, stand up driving hips.

name: Dumbbell Hamstring Curl
instructions: Lie face down, hold dumbbell between feet, curl toward glutes.

name: Resistance Band Leg Curl
instructions: Attach band to ankle, lie face down, curl leg against resistance.

name: Barbell Clean
instructions: Explosive pull from floor to front rack position, catch in quarter squat.

name: Barbell Thruster
instructions: Front squat into overhead press in one fluid movement.

name: Dumbbell Thruster
instructions: Hold dumbbells at shoulders, squat then press overhead as you stand.

name: Kettlebell Turkish Get-Up
instructions: Start lying with kettlebell locked out overhead, stand up keeping it overhead, reverse.

name: Burpee
instructions: Drop to push-up, perform push-up, jump feet to hands, jump up with arms overhead.

name: Man Maker
instructions: Push-up on dumbbells, row each arm, jump feet forward, clean and press dumbbells.

name: Kettlebell Clean and Press
instructions: Clean kettlebell to rack position, press overhead, lower with control.

name: Resistance Band Total Body Row
instructions: Anchor band, row while simultaneously performing a squat.

name: Mountain Climber
instructions: High plank position, alternate driving knees to chest rapidly.

name: Bear Crawl
instructions: On hands and feet, knees hovering, crawl forward alternating opposite hand and foot.

name: Sandbag Carry
instructions: Hoist sandbag to shoulder or bear-hug position and walk for distance or time.

name: Tire Flip
instructions: Deadlift tire to hip height, drive knee under, push and flip forward. Reset and repeat.

name: Sled Push
instructions: Load sled, drive through legs with low torso angle, push for prescribed distance.

name: Battle Ropes Alternating Waves
instructions: Hold one rope end in each hand, alternate pumping arms up and down to create continuous waves.

name: Medicine Ball Slam
instructions: Raise medicine ball overhead, forcefully slam it into ground, catch on bounce or pick up and repeat.
